formulas.name: United Nations Charter
formulas.formula: The United Nations shall promote the establishment and maintenance of international peace and security.

formulas.name: Principle of Sovereign Equality
formulas.formula: All member states of the United Nations are equal in rights and obligations.

formulas.name: Principle of Non-Interference
formulas.formula: Member states shall not interfere in the internal affairs of other member states.

formulas.name: United Nations Charter's Purposes and Principles
formulas.formula: Member states shall promote the development of friendly relations among nations based on respect for the principle of equal rights and self-determination of peoples.

formulas.name: League of Nations Covenant
formulas.formula: The League of Nations shall strive for the prevention and removal of all causes and pretexts of war.

formulas.name: Principle of Collective Security
formulas.formula: Member states shall cooperate to maintain international peace and security.

formulas.name: United Nations Charter's Prohibition on the Use of Force
formulas.formula: Member states shall not use force against the territorial integrity or political independence of any state.
